statuspage.app.nzby Applied AI NZ
HomeCustomersGet Started

API

Create and manage status pages programmatically.

The API is JSON over HTTPS. Account endpoints use the same secure session as the dashboard.

Endpoints

GET/api/v1/status-pagesList your status pages.

POST/api/v1/status-pagesCreate a status page with a path URL like /s/acme.

GET/api/v1/status-pages/{slug}/domainsList custom domain and subdomain records.

POST/api/v1/status-pages/{slug}/domainsRequest slug.statuspage.app.nz or record an external custom domain.

GET/api/v1/customers?q=hostingSearch the customer directory.

Create a page

POST /api/v1/status-pages
{ "name": "Acme API", "slug": "acme", "description": "Current status for Acme API", "website_url": "https://acme.co.nz"
}
